title: Check 3 — Category Config: Insurance & Certification Requirements
description: Reference data for Check 3 rules 3.2.4 (insurance) and 3.2.5 (certifications). Maps PR category_l1 (or category_l2) to required insurance types and certifications. Source: doc §3.3 and §3.4.

MRO / Facilities.notes: Standard coverage for facility maintenance and repair vendors.

Construction.notes: High-risk projects may require higher limits; bonding may also apply.

IT Services.notes: Cloud, managed services, SaaS; cyber liability required for data-handling vendors.

IT.notes: Alias for IT Services when category_l1 is IT.

IT Hardware.notes: Not typically required for hardware-only purchases.

Healthcare / Biomedical.compliance_rationale: Quality systems, medical device manufacturing, FDA-regulated products.

Healthcare / Medical.compliance_rationale: Quality systems for medical devices and clinical supplies.

IT Services.compliance_rationale: Information security, data privacy, cloud service providers.

IT.compliance_rationale: Alias for IT Services when category_l1 is IT.

Professional Services.compliance_rationale: Generally no specific certifications required; may vary by engagement.

IT Hardware.compliance_rationale: Not typically required for hardware resellers.

MRO / Facilities.compliance_rationale: Not typically required; may need trade licenses depending on scope.

Staffing / Contingent Labor.compliance_rationale: Not typically required; staffing agencies may need state licenses.

category_lookup_notes: Match PR category_l1 or category_l2 against keys above (case-insensitive, substring OK). If no match, treat insurance and certifications as not required for that category.
